title: dactylostegium assurgens
intro: Dactylostegium assurgens is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "Dactylostegium" or "Mountain Mint". It is a shrub-like plant native to the Himalayas, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. Dactylostegium assurgens is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves and roots, and is also used in herbal preparations like capsules and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
